# Code of Conduct

## Our pledge

We aim to make participation in the Zeno community welcoming, respectful, and free from harassment for everyone.

## Expected behavior

- Be respectful, constructive, and considerate of different backgrounds and experience levels.
- Focus feedback on ideas, code, documentation, and observable behavior.
- Respect privacy, consent, intellectual property, and security boundaries.
- Help maintain a safe learning and collaboration environment.

## Unacceptable behavior

Harassment, discrimination, threats, personal attacks, doxxing, sexualized conduct, deliberate disruption, publishing private information, or pressuring others to bypass safety or security controls are not acceptable.

## Enforcement

Report conduct concerns through the approved private channel to `<COMMUNITY_CONDUCT_CONTACT>`. Do not post personal data or incident details publicly. Maintainers may remove content, restrict participation, or take other proportionate action. The contact channel and enforcement process must be approved before this template is published.
